시편 130:1.content: Out of the depths I have cried to you, Yahweh.

시편 130:2.content: Lord, hear my voice. Let your ears be attentive to the voice of my petitions.

시편 130:3.content: If you, Yah, kept a record of sins, Lord, who could stand?

시편 130:4.content: But there is forgiveness with you, therefore you are feared.

시편 130:5.content: I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.

시편 130:6.content: My soul longs for the Lord more than watchmen long for the morning, more than watchmen for the morning.

시편 130:7.content: Israel, hope in Yahweh, for there is loving kindness with Yahweh. Abundant redemption is with him.

시편 130:8.content: He will redeem Israel from all their sins.
